note: Fearful, broadly declining tape — breakouts fail. Exposure minimal (multiplier 0.15); cut to a near-full USDT reserve, hold at most one resilient leader tiny, and place a heartbeat trade to satisfy the daily-trade requirement while protective exits run.

computed.regime_reason: breadth_pct 33 < 45 AND median_24h_return -3.2 < -2 AND fear_greed 24 (fear) -> risk_off (broad decline; breakouts fail)
computed.risk_budget_reason: (100 - target_stable_reserve 12) * 0.15 = 13.2; no name prints a valid up-breakout, so the book is a near-full USDT reserve with one tiny resilient-leader heartbeat starter.

breakout_scores.components: most resilient large-cap but EMA stack falling and no up-breakout (close<donchian_upper)
falling stack, negative histogram, no breakout

computed.breakout_reason: No asset prints a valid upside breakout in a falling tape (every EMA stack is inverted and every Donchian gate is below its upper band), so all breakout_scores sit below 0.65. The Skill holds a near-full USDT reserve; a single tiny BTCB heartbeat trade keeps the agent daily-trade compliant while protective exits run.

entry: Do not initiate breakout entries in risk_off (failed-breakout regime); hold the USDT reserve.
If a daily heartbeat trade is required, place the smallest compliant clip in the single most resilient large-cap (highest breakout_score) and immediately bring exposure back to the reserve.
Per-name weight capped at 17%; min_stable_reserve floor 10% always honoured.
exit: Exit any inherited breakout position whose breakout_score < 0.50 or that closes back inside its Donchian channel.
Force-exit at stop_loss 12% or take_profit 40%; on the risk_off transition rotate all risk into USDT.
Stay flat until breadth and momentum recover into risk_on/breakout.

actions.reason: risk_off transition + breakout_score 0.24 < 0.50 -> rotate to USDT
downtrend, no breakout -> rotate to USDT
smallest compliant daily-trade clip in the most resilient large-cap; satisfies min_trades_per_day 1 without taking real breakout risk
